title: Rosacea flare documentation

treatment_and_management.text: Supports clinician documentation of facial distribution, erythema, papules or pustules, flushing, burning or stinging, dryness, edema, and ocular symptoms without inferring diagnosis.
treatment_and_management.rationale: The exact BAD signs-and-symptoms section supports documenting a rosacea flare context, duration and impact, flushing, erythema, papules, pustules, telangiectasia, burning, stinging, edema, dryness, ocular symptoms, clinician inspection and facial distribution without inferring diagnosis or treatment.
treatment_and_management.evidence_extract: Supports clinician documentation of facial distribution, erythema, papules or pustules, flushing, burning or stinging, dryness, edema, and ocular symptoms without inferring diagnosis.

source.title: British Association of Dermatologists guidelines for the management of people with rosacea 2021

exact_section.heading: Recommendations R3–R4 and background — clinical signs, symptoms, distribution, and ocular context

sources_used.title: British Association of Dermatologists guidelines for the management of people with rosacea 2021
sources_used.jurisdiction: United Kingdom; specialty guidance requiring UAE adaptation

source_limitations: Exact phenotype, sites and extent, trigger and exposure, ocular examination, previous treatment and response, medicine, diagnosis, severity, investigation, treatment, referral, and follow-up remain unsupported.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
All prior supported legacy-item mappings were removed because canonical item-level applicability and workflow-specific rationale were not present in explicit repository records.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
